# Tene

> Agentic Secret Runtime -- local-first encrypted secret management that AI agents understand.

Tene encrypts secrets locally with XChaCha20-Poly1305 + Argon2id, generates CLAUDE.md for AI context, and syncs to the cloud with Zero-Knowledge encryption.

## Key Features

- Local-first: secrets never leave your machine unencrypted
- Zero-Knowledge cloud sync: 4-layer encryption (L1 values, L2 envelope, L3 TLS, L4 S3 SSE)
- AI-native: auto-generates CLAUDE.md so AI agents discover secrets without seeing values
- Team sharing: X25519 ECDH key wrapping for secure team collaboration
- Multi-environment: dev, staging, prod with isolated vaults
- Recovery: BIP-39 12-word mnemonic for master key recovery
- Cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows (amd64/arm64)

## Quick Start

  curl -fsSL https://tene.sh/install.sh | sh
  tene init              # Create vault + master password + recovery key + CLAUDE.md
  tene set API_KEY sk_xxx  # Encrypt and store a secret
  tene run -- npm start  # Inject all secrets as env vars and run command

## For AI Agents

Tene auto-generates CLAUDE.md for project-specific context:
  tene init          # Creates .tene/vault.db + CLAUDE.md with secret references

Key commands for agents:
  tene list          # List available secret keys (values masked)
  tene run -- CMD    # Inject secrets into any command as environment variables
  tene env           # Switch between environments (dev/staging/prod)

IMPORTANT: Never use `tene get <KEY>` in AI conversations -- plaintext values may leak into logs.
Use `tene list` to verify secrets exist, and `tene run --` to inject them.

## Cloud Features (Pro Plan)

  tene login         # OAuth login via GitHub
  tene push          # Encrypt vault + upload to cloud (Sync Envelope)
  tene pull          # Download + decrypt remote vault
  tene sync          # Push + Pull combined
  tene team create   # Create team with X25519 project key
  tene team invite   # Invite member with wrapped project key
  tene billing       # View subscription status

## Dashboard

Web dashboard at app.tene.sh for:
- Vault management and sync status
- Team member management and RBAC
- Device registration (X25519 public keys)
- Audit logs
- Billing and subscription management

## Encryption Architecture

Master Password -> Argon2id (64MB, 3 iter) -> Master Key (256-bit)
Master Key -> HKDF-SHA256 -> Encryption Key, Sync Key, Device Key, Auth Hash
Secrets encrypted with XChaCha20-Poly1305 (192-bit nonce, key name as AAD)
Cloud sync: Sync Envelope wraps entire vault before upload (Zero-Knowledge)
Team: X25519 ECDH shared secret -> HKDF(projectID) -> wrap Project Key per member

## Tech Stack

- CLI: Go 1.25+, Cobra, modernc.org/sqlite
- API: Go + Echo v4, PostgreSQL 16
- Frontend: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4
- Infra: AWS ECS Fargate, RDS, S3, Terraform
- Auth: ES256 JWT + GitHub OAuth (PKCE)
- Billing: LemonSqueezy (Merchant of Record)

## Links

- Website: https://tene.sh
- Dashboard: https://app.tene.sh
- GitHub: https://github.com/tomo-kay/tene
